chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.432 of 2021 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of main case 14.10.2024. Mr. Khalid Iqbal, advocate for applicant. Mr. Azain Nadeem, advocate for proposed accused. Mr. Siraj Ali Khan Chandio, Additional Prosecutor General. Applicant filed an application under section 22-A Cr. P.C. for registration of FIR alleging against the respondent that on 31.05.2021 and 01.06.2021, the proposed accused/respondent along with 40/50 armed persons dispossessed the applicant from land owned by M/s. Humair Associates Builders measuring 14.05 acres situated in Survey No.83, Deh Dozen Tappo Gadap. This application was heard and dismissed by the leaned trial Court/Justice of Peace on 06.07.2021. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that cognizable offence has been made out from the story of the applicant, however, he has admitted that he has not filed any application under Illegal Dispossession Act against the proposed accused for dispossessing him etc. More so, the impugned order shows that on the same plot a civil suit is pending before this Court between the same parties. Hence, no case for registration of FIR is made out. If the applicant has any grievance, he may approach to the relevant forum under section 200 Cr. P.C. This application is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE HANIF
